codeReview.summary: Implementation successfully adds per-sandbox gateway rate limiting with end-to-end isolation. The PerSandboxRateLimiter uses a fixed-window counter algorithm keyed by sandbox identity, ensuring one sandbox hitting its quota does not affect another. Rate limiting is correctly positioned after authentication but before provider calls, returning HTTP 429 with Retry-After header. Comprehensive test coverage with 17 test cases validates unit behavior, concurrent access, multi-sandbox isolation, and handler integration. The implementation correctly fulfills VAL-GATEWAY-005 and VAL-CROSS-115.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The services.yaml gateway start command does not include the new rate limiting environment variables (GATEWAY_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS, GATEWAY_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW). While the code has sensible defaults (60 req/min), operators may want to tune these in different environments.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: services.yaml shows: 'start: GATEWAY_PORT=8084 go run ./cmd/gateway' — missing GATEWAY_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS and GATEWAY_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW. Compare to cmd/gateway/main.go which loads these via LoadRateLimiterConfig().

sharedStateObservations.observation: The gateway-provider-boundary.md library file mentions 'Future Work: Per-sandbox rate limiting (VAL-GATEWAY-005) — next feature'. This should be updated to reflect that the feature is now complete.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/gateway-provider-boundary.md line under 'Future Work' section still lists per-sandbox rate limiting as pending.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The tokenBucket struct comment says 'simple sliding-window counter' but the implementation is actually a fixed-window algorithm (resets after window expires). This is a minor documentation inconsistency that doesn't affect correctness.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: internal/gateway/ratelimit.go line 54: 'simple sliding-window counter' — but record() implements fixed-window (resets when now.Sub(b.windowStart) >= rl.window).

summary: Feature implementation is complete and correct. The per-sandbox rate limiter provides proper isolation between sandboxes, validates the expected behavior for VAL-GATEWAY-005 and VAL-CROSS-115, and includes comprehensive test coverage. All validators pass (go test, go vet, go build). Minor shared-state updates recommended for services.yaml and library documentation to reflect the completed feature.
